meta.title: Madeira Surf Progress | Coaching & Guided Sessions
meta.description: Premium surf coaching, guiding, and progression programmes on Madeira Island. Private coaching and 1–2 week intensives — coached by Nilton Freitas, competitive surfer trained under high-level coaches.
meta.og_description: Premium surf coaching and progression programmes on Madeira Island. Coached by Nilton Freitas — competitive surfer focused on real technical progression.
meta.og_image_alt: Surfer riding a long right-hander at Jardim do Mar, Madeira.
meta.twitter_description: Premium surf coaching and progression programmes on Madeira Island. Real technical progression at every level.

services.section_lede: Four ways to train and surf with Madeira Surf Progress — from single sessions to two-week intensive camps. Every booking is shaped around your level, the conditions, and the goals you want to reach.
services.coaching_prefill: Hi Nilton, I'd like to book a Private Surf Coaching session.
services.guiding_prefill: Hi Nilton, I'd like to enquire about the Surf Guiding Experience.
services.week_prefill: Hi Nilton, I'm interested in the 1 Week Surf Progression Program.
services.intensive_prefill: Hi Nilton, I'd like to apply for the 2 Week Intensive Surf Camp.

contact.section_title: Let's get you on the water
contact.whatsapp_prefill: Hi Nilton! I'd like to book a surf session in Madeira. Could you share availability?

footer.tagline: Certified surf guide — Madeira Island, Portugal
footer.rights: © {year} Madeira Surf Progress. All rights reserved.
footer.legal_entity: Madeira Surf Progress is a brand of Nilton Freitas, licensed surf school in Madeira, Portugal.

consent.banner_text: We use cookies to measure site traffic anonymously. No tracking until you accept.
